title: Scope enforcement middleware + custom scope registration
acceptance_criteria: Extend existing require_scope() to check agent's scopes array (from identity.agents.scopes + custom_scopes)
Hobby tier: require_scope() returns immediately (no scope enforcement)
Scale only: POST /api/v1/auth/scopes registers custom scope for account
GET /api/v1/auth/scopes: lists custom scopes for account
Custom scopes stored in identity.agents.custom_scopes array
Scale-only: 403 'tier_limit_reached' if non-Scale tries to register custom scope
